description_long: This jewelry store is a single-story, modern commercial building with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular footprint. The front facade features large floor-to-ceiling glass windows and double glass doors, framed by white walls and accented with a wide wooden deck and metal railings. The side and rear walls are mostly solid with a few smaller windows, providing privacy and security. The building's exterior is predominantly white, with natural wood and metal elements adding contrast and sophistication. The interior layout is visible through the expansive front windows, revealing multiple rooms and open spaces suitable for retail display and customer service. The overall design emphasizes transparency, accessibility, and a contemporary aesthetic suitable for an upscale urban jewelry store.
description: A modern, single-story jewelry store with large glass windows, white walls, and a wooden deck with metal railings. The design is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing openness and security.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows, double glass doors, and a wide wooden deck with metal railings.
description_view_1: Side view with solid white walls, two large windows, and a glimpse of the deck wrapping around the corner.
description_view_2: Rear view with mostly solid walls, a single door, and minimal window openings for privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two large windows and partial visibility of the deck and front facade.
